summary: Twelve military equipment targets were assessed, all confirmed with NO DAMAGE, showing armored vehicles in active motion across a dusty, arid terrain. The full scene depicts a large convoy of military vehicles moving in formation, kicking up significant dust plumes as they traverse a dry, uneven landscape under a partly cloudy sky. The consistent NO DAMAGE assessments across all targets indicate the convoy is operating without visible combat damage or mechanical failure, suggesting full operational capability.
